title: Impact of Cross-Border Digital Transmissions on MSMEs in South Africa

summary.about: How imported digital products and services affect South African MSME growth.
summary.audience: South African MSMEs, digital-trade officials and WTO policymakers.
summary.method: Uses MSME employment, productivity and size time series with digital-import data from OECD input-output tables.
summary.insights: Digital imports contribute positively to MSME performance, supporting continued duty-free electronic transmissions.
